basicAuthUser.description: The username of the data source account

keepCookies.description: Grafana proxy deletes forwarded cookies by default. Specify cookies by name that should be forwarded to the data source.

serverName.description: A Servername is used to verify the hostname on the returned certificate

tlsAuth.description: Validate using TLS client authentication, in which the server authenticates the client

tlsAuthWithCACert.description: Add your own Certificate Authority (CA) certificate on top of one generated by the certificate authorities for additional security measures

tlsSkipVerify.description: Skipping TLS certificate validation is not recommended unless absolutely necessary or for testing

secureValues.description: The password of the data source account
The client certificate can be generated from a Certificate Authority or be self-signed
The client key can be generated from a Certificate Authority or be self-signed
